docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY SANTIS, ISABEL PIERCE, RICHARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID FLEISIG. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ISABEL SANTIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICHARD PIERCE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-02-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SANTIS, ISABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PIERCE, RICHARD $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,150.00, $3,500 SECURITY DEPOSIT DOUBLED PER CC.S. 1950.5(8) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PIERCE, RICHARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUN-02-2025 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,428.00 FILED BY SANTIS, ISABEL AS TO DEFENDANT PIERCE, RICHARD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED MAR-08-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PIERCE, RICHARD
